message:
feat(http,web): add StatusCode type, request/response ergonomics, fix scalar-guard defect

HTTP h1 types.rs (B.2 ecosystem-parity):
- Add StatusCode type with 30+ named constants and category methods
- Add RequestBuilder: json(), form(), query(), bearer_auth(), basic_auth(),
  content_type(), accept()
- Add Request: head(), patch(), options(), header_value(), content_type(),
  content_length()
- Add Response: text(), json(), bytes(), is_success/client_error/server_error(),
  status_code(), header_value(), ok(), not_found(), json_response()
- Add internal helpers: percent_encode, url_encode_params, base64_encode
- 31 new tests (52 total)

HTTP h1 mod.rs:
- Re-export StatusCode from types module

web/extract.rs (scalar-guard defect fix):
- Add len()==1 guard to Path<T> and Query<T> scalar fast paths
- Previously values().next() could nondeterministically pick any value
  when multiple parameters were present
- 2 regression tests confirming multi-param scalar extraction falls through

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
